description: User 2 (services@getsally.io): Creates OnSocial UK project — verifies multi-project flows, project switching, data isolation between projects. Per scheduled_task_v1 Phase 4c.

steps.description: User creates a second project for UK influencer platforms.
steps.user_prompt: Create a new project called OnSocial UK. My website is https://onsocial.com/. I'm targeting influencer platforms and creator economy companies in the UK.
user_prompt_variants: New project: OnSocial UK, site onsocial.com, UK influencer/creator platforms
Create project OnSocial UK for finding creator economy companies in the UK, my site is onsocial.com

steps.description: Verify user can switch between Result and OnSocial UK projects.
Result project data should be unchanged (215 companies).
Switch to OnSocial UK — should have 0 companies (new project).
Gather companies for OnSocial UK — completely independent from Result.
steps.user_prompt: Find influencer platforms in UK, about 10 targets
user_prompt_variants: Gather creator economy companies in the UK

steps.description: OnSocial's blacklist should NOT include Result's companies.

db_checks: 2 projects for services@getsally.io: Result (215 companies) + OnSocial UK (new)
OnSocial UK has own discovered_companies (NOT shared with Result)
Blacklist for OnSocial UK does NOT include Result's companies
